name: Calculadora de Hipoteca
desc: Calcula la cuota mensual, intereses totales y coste total de tu hipoteca.
description: Calcula la cuota mensual, intereses totales y coste total de tu hipoteca.
seo_description: Calcula la cuota mensual de tu hipoteca, los intereses totales y el coste total. Introduce precio, entrada, tipo de interés y plazo.
example_label: Calculating monthly mortgage payment for a €285,000 home with 18% down payment over 28 years at 3.25% interest.
result_context: The cuota_mensual of {cuota_mensual} represents your monthly mortgage payment including principal and interest. Total interest paid over the loan life will be {total_intereses}.

steps.description: Calculate loan principal after down payment
Convert annual rate to monthly rate

mistakes: Forgetting to include property taxes and insurance in total monthly housing costs
Using the home price instead of the loan principal (after down payment) in calculations
Not accounting for the total interest paid over the entire loan term
